title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Aliens Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Aliens Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Aliens Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Sales Manager to strengthen our Ghaziabad-based team.

About Aliens Group:
Aliens Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aliens Group!
